Let's Get Started

ORDS Music Academy

Molding the next generation of musicians through discipline, creativity, confidence, and excellence.

Book Free ConsultationExplore Classes
Music Lessons We Offer

Choose your instrument.

From first notes to advanced growth, we help students build skill, confidence, and discipline.

Drum

Private drum lessons in Manassas, VA focused on rhythm, timing, technique, confidence, and live performance.

Explore lessons →

Piano

Private piano lessons in Manassas, VA for foundations, worship keys, chords, technique, and musical confidence.

Explore lessons →

Guitar

Private guitar lessons in Manassas, VA for clean chords, rhythm, tone, worship playing, and confident musicianship.

Explore lessons →

Bass

Private bass lessons in Manassas, VA focused on groove, pocket, timing, and supporting a band with confidence.

Explore lessons →

Vocals

Build vocal control, pitch confidence, expression, and stage presence.

Explore lessons →

Audio Classes

Recording, mixing, mastering, audio production, and creative studio support for artists, students, and worship teams.

Explore lessons →
